# Autonomous Ads Source Index

Converted from `67_autonomous_ads_source_index.csv` so the pack remains Markdown-only.

| title | source_type | topic | url | why_it_matters | bias_note |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Google Ads API Responsive Search Ads | official documentation | platform API | https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/docs/responsive-search-ads/create-responsive-search-ads | Shows RSA creation and required assets | low bias; platform-specific |
| Google Ads API Create Campaigns | official documentation | platform API | https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/docs/campaigns/create-campaigns | Campaign creation through API | low bias; implementation docs |
| Google AI Max for Search campaigns | official documentation | platform AI automation | https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/docs/campaigns/ai-max-for-search-campaigns/getting-started | AI-powered Search campaign optimization layer | platform source; promotional framing |
| Google Ads Misrepresentation Policy | official policy | compliance | https://support.google.com/adspolicy/answer/6020955 | Rules against misleading or missing information | authoritative for Google Ads |
| Google Ads Policies Overview | official policy | compliance | https://support.google.com/adspolicy/answer/6008942 | Policy hub for Google Ads | authoritative for Google Ads |
| Google 2025 Ads Safety Report article | official report summary | ad safety | https://blog.google/products/ads-commerce/2025-ads-safety-report/ | Gemini-based enforcement and bad-ad blocking | platform self-report; useful current signal |
| Meta Marketing API: Create Campaign | official documentation | platform API | https://developers.facebook.com/docs/marketing-api/get-started/basic-ad-creation/create-an-ad-campaign/ | Programmatic campaign creation | authoritative for Meta API |
| Meta Marketing API: Ad Creative | official documentation | platform API | https://developers.facebook.com/docs/marketing-api/creative/ | Ad creative objects and setup | authoritative for Meta API |
| Meta Advantage+ Creative | official product page | platform AI automation | https://www.facebook.com/business/ads/meta-advantage-plus/creative | AI-generated/enhanced creative variations | platform promotional source |
| Meta Advertising Standards | official policy | compliance | https://transparency.meta.com/policies/ad-standards/ | Ad rules and deceptive practices policies | authoritative for Meta |
| TikTok API for Business | official documentation | platform API | https://ads.tiktok.com/help/article/marketing-api?lang=en | Batch delivery and creative management at scale | authoritative for TikTok |
| TikTok Business API Portal | official documentation | platform API | https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs | API guide portal | authoritative for TikTok |
| LinkedIn Create and Manage Campaigns | official documentation | platform API | https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/linkedin/marketing/integrations/ads/account-structure/create-and-manage-campaigns?view=li-lms-2026-03 | Campaign creation and management | authoritative for LinkedIn API |
| LinkedIn Create and Manage Creatives | official documentation | platform API | https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/linkedin/marketing/integrations/ads/account-structure/create-and-manage-creatives?view=li-lms-2026-03 | Creative creation and limits | authoritative for LinkedIn API |
| LinkedIn Advertising Policies | official policy | compliance | https://www.linkedin.com/legal/ads-policy | Rules on misleading claims and restricted ads | authoritative for LinkedIn |
| Microsoft Advertising Responsive Search Ads | official documentation | platform API | https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/advertising/guides/responsive-search-ads?view=bingads-13 | Responsive search ad requirements | authoritative for Microsoft Ads |
| OpenAI Agents SDK | official documentation | agent architecture | https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/agents | Agents, tools, handoffs, tracing | authoritative for OpenAI |
| OpenAI Function Calling | official documentation | agent architecture | https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/function-calling | Tool/function calling flow | authoritative for OpenAI |
| OpenAI Structured Outputs | official documentation | agent architecture | https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/structured-outputs | Schema-constrained outputs | authoritative for OpenAI |
| OpenAI Image Generation | official documentation | creative generation | https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/image-generation | Generate and edit images through API | authoritative for OpenAI |
| OpenAI Computer Use | official documentation | agent safety | https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/tools-computer-use | Computer-use patterns and human-in-loop warning | authoritative for OpenAI |
| NIST AI 600-1 Generative AI Profile | government framework | AI governance | https://www.nist.gov/publications/artificial-intelligence-risk-management-framework-generative-artificial-intelligence | Risk management profile for GenAI | high authority; voluntary framework |
| FTC AI enforcement/news | regulator | AI claims | https://www.ftc.gov/industry/technology/artificial-intelligence | AI-related deception enforcement | US regulator; jurisdiction-specific |
| FTC Bringing Dark Patterns to Light | regulator report | dark patterns | https://www.ftc.gov/reports/bringing-dark-patterns-light | Dark pattern risks in digital design | regulator perspective |
| FTC Endorsements, Influencers, Reviews | regulator guidance | endorsements | https://www.ftc.gov/business-guidance/advertising-marketing/endorsements-influencers-reviews | Disclosure and endorsement rules | US regulator; useful general standard |
| ACCC False or misleading claims | regulator guidance | Australia compliance | https://www.accc.gov.au/consumers/advertising-and-promotions/false-or-misleading-claims | Claims must be true, accurate, provable | authoritative for Australia |
| ACCC Social media promotions | regulator guidance | Australia compliance | https://www.accc.gov.au/consumers/advertising-and-promotions/social-media-promotions | Australian Consumer Law applies to social ads | authoritative for Australia |
| OAIC Commercially available AI products guidance | regulator guidance | privacy/AI | https://www.oaic.gov.au/privacy/privacy-guidance-for-organisations-and-government-agencies/guidance-on-privacy-and-the-use-of-commercially-available-ai-products | Privacy obligations when using AI products | authoritative for Australia |

| Grewal et al. - How generative AI is shaping future marketing | peer reviewed | AI marketing | https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s11747-024-01064-3 | Broad marketing impact of GenAI | academic; current |
| Kshetri - Generative AI in marketing | peer reviewed | AI marketing | https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S026840122300097X | Applications, opportunities, challenges | academic; cited |
| Consumer responses to AI disclosure labels | peer reviewed | AI disclosure | https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/10.1177/21582440261417793 | AI disclosure can affect novelty/authenticity perceptions | academic; context-specific |
| Geng et al. - Bandit-based experimentation system for online advertising | conference paper | experimentation | https://cdn.aaai.org/ojs/17775/17775-13-21269-1-2-20210518.pdf | Bandits for creative allocation | academic/industry |
